2606.14188.title: Robustness without Wrinkles: Parallel Simulation and Robust MPC for Certified Deformable Manipulation
2606.14188.paper_summary: We present CORD-SLS, a real-time control method for safe deformable object manipulation, with a focus on ropes and cloth. At its core is a GPU-parallel differentiable simulator with contact smoothing which enables efficient gradient-based planning through intermittent contact. To robustly satisfy constraints under model and sensing uncertainty, we develop a real-time, GPU-parallel output-feedback robust model predictive control (MPC) algorithm that plans with this simulator. We further show that the simulator accelerates model-based RL for training neural manipulation policies. To improve real-world robustness, we use conformal prediction to calibrate visual-feedback and perception-error bounds for MPC, producing reachable tubes that enable high-probability safe control. We evaluate CORD-SLS on high-dimensional, contact-rich rope and cloth manipulation tasks in simulation and hardware, including obstacle avoidance, routing, folding, and smoothing. Across settings, CORD-SLS achieves millisecond-speed planning, exceeding baselines in safety, speed, and task success.
2606.14188.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 CORD-SLS，一種針對安全可變形物體操作的實時控制方法，重點在於繩索和布料。其核心是一個具有接觸平滑功能的 GPU 並行可微分模擬器，該模擬器能夠通過間歇性接觸實現高效的基於梯度的規劃。為了在模型和感測不確定性下穩健地滿足約束，我們開發了一種實時的 GPU 並行輸出反饋穩健模型預測控制 (MPC) 算法，該算法使用這個模擬器進行規劃。我們進一步展示了該模擬器加速了基於模型的強化學習，以訓練神經操作策略。為了提高現實世界的穩健性，我們使用保形預測來校準 MPC 的視覺反饋和感知誤差界限，生成可達的管道，從而實現高概率的安全控制。我們在模擬和硬體上對 CORD-SLS 進行了高維度、接觸豐富的繩索和布料操作任務的評估，包括避障、路由、折疊和平滑。在各種設置中，CORD-SLS 實現了毫秒級的規劃速度，在安全性、速度和任務成功率上超越了基準。
2606.14188.author: Wei-Chen Li et.al.
2606.14188.authors: Wei-Chen Li, Jeffrey Fang, Sasanka Polisetti, Yuexi Song, Glen Chou
